bibliographic_info.title: Dual-frequency to five-frequency real-time precise point positioning using new BDS-3 PPP-B2b service

grounding_quotes: Earth, Planets and Space (2024) 76:82 Earth, Planets and Space https://doi.org/10.1186/s40623-024-02031-6 FULL PAPER Open Access Dual-frequency to five-frequency real-time precise point positioning using new BDS-3 PPP-B2b service Haochen Yang1, Xiaodong Ren1,2* , Mingxiu Liu1 and Xiaohong Zhang1,2,3 Abstract BeiDou global navigation satellite system (BDS-3), a developed GNSS by China, has the abil
Meanwhile, BDS-3 has officially provided the satellite-based precise point positioning (PPP) service through the B2b signal (PPP-B2b) since 2021.
